# validationMetrics

**Instance Property**

Measurements of the classifier’s performance on the validation data set.

## Declaration

```swift
var validationMetrics: MLClassifierMetrics { get }
```

## Evaluating a classifier

- **evaluation(on:)**: Evaluates the classifier on the provided labeled data.
- **trainingMetrics**: Measurements of the classifier’s performance on the training data set.
